reason: Defines RVV hardware truth, descriptor-driven non-goals, and unified TCRV architecture boundaries.
Defines tcrv.exec as execution envelope and ABI boundary owner without extension compute semantics.
Defines RVV selected binary family, selected config, runtime length, and descriptor quarantine rules.
Defines plugin-local emission and registry interfaces without family branches in core orchestration.
Defines selected boundary flow from source inputs through plugin selection and runtime ABI boundaries.
Defines target artifact export, runtime ABI parameter mirrors, composite route preflight, and bundle record contracts.
Defines extension-family ops to EmitC to intrinsic C route and descriptor boundary.
Defines required lit/C++/runtime evidence for RVV artifact, bundle, dispatch, and fail-closed cases.

summary: Promoted generated RVV runtime ABI invocation into production owners: RuntimeABICallablePlan and TargetArtifactExport now reject reordered runtime ABI signatures; RVVMicrokernel emits production runtime_abi_invocation_contract in source/header/object evidence; RVVScalarDispatch emits dispatch_runtime_abi_invocation_contract with runtime n plus dispatch guard; rvv_microkernel_e2e.py now parses compiler-emitted invocation contracts and records them in evidence.
